scores.name: hardship_handling
scores.reason: Agent 1 acknowledged the borrower's inability to pay the full amount and noted hardship signals (job loss, medical issue). However, it did not explicitly offer a hardship program, which is a missed opportunity.

scores.name: policy_safe_resolution
scores.reason: Agent 2 proposed a payment plan that aligns with company policy, ensuring the arrangement would be completed within 30 days. The offer was compliant with the borrower's stated capacity.

scores.name: required_disclosures_and_identity
scores.reason: Agent 1 properly disclosed its identity as an AI and that the conversation was being logged, fulfilling all disclosure requirements.

scores.name: stop_contact_and_non_harassment
scores.reason: Agent 1 acknowledged the borrower's stop-contact request and ensured that future contact would only occur if a concrete option was available.

scores.name: handoff_execution
scores.reason: The handoff from Agent 1 to Agent 2 was smooth, with no unnecessary repetition of questions or information. Agent 2 effectively built on the established context.
